rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LULA M. CANNON TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Motion For Leave To Intervene In Pending Case, Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Marc Seidenfeld In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: LATE TENTATIVE Motion is denied because (1) Bullock's Motion is procedurally defective, because it failed to attach a copy of his proposed pleading to his Motion (In Re Sutter Health Uninsured Pricing Cases (2009) 171 Cal.App. 4th 495, 513), (2) the Cannon Trust is already substantially representing Bullock's interests in this matter because both the Cannon Trust and the English Trust have the same interest in defeating Petitioner's claim to a right of occupancy, which would make the building more attractive to potential buyers (CCP Section 387(b)), and (3) Bullock does not have a direct and immediate interest in the litigation since any judgment in this case will not adversely affect Bullock's property interest, i.e., the English Trust has and will continue to have a right to partition and sale of its 3/8 interest in the building regardless of the outcome of this action.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: BJ HERRAN REVOCABLE TR ESTABLISHED 4/13/2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Amend Complaint Substituting Respondents True Name For Fictitious Name Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 474 [Filed Concurrently With Notice Fo Motion And Motion To File First Amended Complaint]
rulings.Rulings: The motion for Leave to File a First Amended Complaint (hereinafter titled "Amended Petition"), Motion to Amend Petition Substituting Charles Odenthal for DOE 1, and Motion to Amend Petition Substituting Phyllis Berenson for DOE 2 are granted. The Court will not deem the Amended Petition filed and served as requested. Any party who disagrees with the tentative and requests argument must notify the court (415-551--3702) and all parties or counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on November 13, 2013.
